title: 10 health benefits of Physalis alkekengi (chinese lantern)
intro: Physalis alkekengi, also known as Chinese lantern, has health benefits such as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. Its medicinal properties also help to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, by relaxing the airways. By consuming teas or tinctures made from this plant, people can experience relief from these ailments, improving their quality of life and reducing the frequency and severity of symptoms.
